issues.description: Effect claims 'Rest' action, but card text describes preventing a Character from becoming active during opponent's next Refresh Phase. This is a conditional prevention mechanic, not a Rest action. Rest is an immediate state change; this effect must prevent the Refresh Phase activation.
Entirely fabricated effect. Card text contains no KO action or cost-based targeting. This effect has no basis in the official card text.

Card text describes a single effect ('Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase'), but DSL contains two unrelated effects. The single effect requires a custom or conditional action type not present in standard OPTCG DSL (no standard action prevents Refresh Phase activation).
